latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Ready for a new week? Me too! Here’s how to start:
⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀
Put out a fresh dish towel and/or hand towel.
Clear and wipe a counter.
Scrub your kitchen sink.
Relax and make a plan for the week ahead.
⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀
You don’t have to clean everything in one day. With the Clean Mama Routine we realize that the dirt will always be there but we’re proactive about cleaning it up, not reactive about the mess.  Every day is a fresh start and when you know what to clean and when to clean it, there isn’t any guesswork. 
⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀
Ready? Here’s to a new week - tag a friend and follow along!  Tap to shop some of my favorite multi-purpose products and head to the link to get started with the Clean Mama Routine. #cleanmama https://cleanmama.com/start-here/

My favorite laundry tip? Do a load of laundry from start to put away every single day. If you don't have enough to do a load of day, put your laundry on a schedule – do a load or two every few days. Finish up the week with Sheets & Towels on Saturdays and you'll wonder how you ever did laundry before! 
⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀
Looking to add an eco-friendly solution to your laundry room? Try the concentrated Laundry Detergent Spray Refill Box and Glass Refill Bottle! You’ll find this in the shop as a bundle and a bundle with Wool Dryer Balls too! Made in the USA, Leaping Bunny Certified and USDA Certified Bio-Based. You can’t go wrong! ⁠

🚽If your bathroom never feels fully clean, it’s not because you’re not trying…

➡️It’s because the order matters more than the effort.

Get my guide that walks you through exactly what to clean and when so you’re not undoing your own work.

Comment BATHROOM and I’ll send it to you.

If your house feels out of control, start here.⁠
Not with deep cleaning.⁠
Not with organizing.⁠
Not with catching up.⁠
Start with a simple rhythm.⁠
⁠
The Clean Mama Routine shows you exactly:⁠
⁠
✔️what to do daily⁠
✔️what to do weekly⁠
✔️how to stay consistent⁠
✔️how to stop guessing⁠
⁠
This is the system that keeps homes manageable without spending hours ⁠
cleaning.⁠
Comment GUIDE and I’ll send it to you or grab it at cleanmama.com/subscribe.⁠
Small tasks + a clear plan = less deciding⁠

Summer homekeeping doesn't have to be perfect — it just has to be manageable. ⁠
⁠
Swipe through for 5 things that actually help your home stay ahead of the mess this summer, without spending your whole day cleaning.⁠
⁠
A made bed and clear counter is a win. Wiped counters count even if the appliances aren't deep cleaned. Laundry in a basket still counts. A 10-minute tidy before bed beats a 2-hour Saturday clean every time.⁠
⁠
This is the Good Enough Summer Standard — and it's enough.⁠
Comment SUMMER below and I'll send you the link! It's just $9 tonight — goes back to $14 tomorrow." 👇

✨How to Make a Bed the Clean Mama Way

Step 1: Straighten your fitted sheet
Give it a quick tug to make sure it’s smooth and tucked in at the corners. This is the foundation — if it’s lumpy, the whole bed looks messy.

Step 2: Lay your duvet flat
Shake it out, center it on the bed, and let it fall evenly on both sides. No tucking needed.

Step 3: Fold the top down
Fold the top edge of the duvet down about 10–12 inches. This little detail makes a bed look intentional and hotel-like without any extra effort.

Step 4: Arrange your pillows
Place your sleeping pillows flat first, then lean any accent pillows against them. I keep it to two sleeping pillows plus one extra — anything more and you’re just making more work for yourself every single night.

Step 5: Smooth and done
One quick pass with your hands across the whole surface. Add a throw blanket to the bottom if you want a little extra or if you use one. That’s it. Step back and admire it. 

Three minutes. Every morning. Life-changing? Genuinely, yes.

✨Comment BED for a link to my full bed-making method — including the bedding formula that makes this so fast and links to my bedding favorites.

📌 Save this for June!

Take the guesswork out of what to clean and when to clean it.

The FREE June Homekeeping Calendar includes the Daily and Weekly Tasks—the foundation of the Clean Mama Routine.

These simple tasks help you: ✔️ Keep your home functioning ✔️ Prevent mess and buildup ✔️ Eliminate daily decision fatigue ✔️ Stay consistent without starting over
Print it. Save it. Put it somewhere you and your family see it every day.

When the plan is already made, it’s easier to show up and do a little at a time—and that’s where the real transformation happens.

Try it for one week and notice how much calmer your home feels.

🫧Comment JUNE and I’ll send you the FREE June Homekeeping Calendar, tips for how to use it, and a link to my 21-Day Home Reset if you’re ready for a fresh start.

This came up in a recent Homekeeping Society Q&A and I knew I had to share it here too.

Most cleaning routines fail because there’s no built-in reset.
That’s why I built Friday Catch-All Day into the Clean Mama Routine. 
Every Friday I:  ✔️ tie up loose ends  ✔️ reset the kitchen  ✔️ make a meal plan  ✔️ clean out the fridge  ✔️ catch up on laundry  ✔️ prep for the weekend 
Not perfectly. Not all day long. Just enough to stop the house from spiraling.
Friday Catch-All changed everything for me — I stopped spending my entire weekend cleaning.
 Want to see how the full routine works together? Comment GUIDE and I’ll drop it in your DMs 👇

POV: you just washed all your floors and you’re not even tired 😌✨

The self-clean at the end is just the cherry on top. I press a button and walk away and it clean, sanitizes, and dries itself. That’s it.

Most people don’t need a better cleaning hack.⁠
⁠
They need a repeatable system.⁠
⁠
That’s the difference between constantly reacting to your home and finally feeling on top of it.⁠
⁠
The Clean Mama Routine was designed to remove the daily guesswork so you always know:⁠
✔️what to clean⁠
✔️when to clean it⁠
✔️what matters most⁠
✔️what can wait⁠
⁠
Inside Homekeeping Society, we follow the full system together with monthly planning, rotating tasks, support, and structure designed for real life.⁠
⁠
If you’re tired of constantly starting over, this is for you.⁠
Doors are open this week!⁠
Comment SYSTEM and I’ll send you the link.
